last_cycle_summary: Re-read Gate Engine status and v1Contracts, inspected RemoteMatterPage and the approval policy audit, then added a static approval-policy regression that verifies the frontend persists a final memo gate snapshot before requesting approval and carries gateSnapshotAuditEventId into the approval payload. Required V1 gates are represented, external-source gate decisions enter the persisted audit path, and final export remains fail-closed.

required_gate_map.citation: implemented in runGates using calculateCitationCoverage; failed citation gate blocks final export through canExportFinal
required_gate_map.human_approval: implemented in runGates; high-risk final export and unresolved memo review comments fail closed
required_gate_map.missing_material: implemented in runGates; failed documents, open issue questions, and missing-material risk language fail high-risk/final export
required_gate_map.conflict: implemented in runGates; conflict markers in evidence, issues, risks, or open review comments fail closed
required_gate_map.scope_jurisdiction: implemented as jurisdiction gate; unclear professional standard or matter type other warns/blocks depending on final/high-risk context
required_gate_map.privilege_confidentiality: implemented as privilege gate; warning remains visible with export caution and persisted sensitive-material provenance
required_gate_map.external_source: implemented this cycle; external document source_uri, evidence metadata, and explicit external-source markers warn, and unapproved final export fails closed
required_gate_map.export: implemented in runGates; draft export can proceed with visible warnings, final export fails if any prior gate failed

blockers: No Gate Engine baseline blocker remains for required V1 gate representation, external-source gate audit persistence, or fail-closed final export.
Privilege/confidentiality remains a visible export caution rather than a post-approval blocking gate; no large privilege/confidentiality policy refactor was attempted in this lane.
next_actions: Consider a dedicated final-export approval field for external-source and privilege/confidentiality review instead of overloading humanApproved.
